old_javadoc:
/** * Formats an elapsed time into a pluralization correct string. * *

This method formats durations using the days and lower fields of the * format pattern. Months and larger are not used.

* * @param durationMillis the elapsed time to report in milliseconds * @param suppressLeadingZeroElements suppresses leading 0 elements * @param suppressTrailingZeroElements suppresses trailing 0 elements * @return the formatted text in days/hours/minutes/seconds, not null * @throws IllegalArgumentException if durationMillis is negative */
new_javadoc:
/** * Formats an elapsed time into a pluralization correct string. *

* This method formats durations using the days and lower fields of the format pattern. Months and larger are not used. *

* * @param durationMillis the elapsed time to report in milliseconds. * @param suppressLeadingZeroElements suppresses leading 0 elements. * @param suppressTrailingZeroElements suppresses trailing 0 elements. * @return the formatted text in days/hours/minutes/seconds, not null. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if durationMillis is negative. */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/DurationFormatUtils.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/DurationFormatUtils.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/DurationFormatUtils.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/time/DurationFormatUtils.java @@ -428,21 +422,17 @@ /** * Formats an elapsed time into a pluralization correct string. + *

+ * This method formats durations using the days and lower fields of the format pattern. Months and larger are not used. + *

* - *

This method formats durations using the days and lower fields of the - * format pattern. Months and larger are not used.

- * - * @param durationMillis the elapsed time to report in milliseconds - * @param suppressLeadingZeroElements suppresses leading 0 elements - * @param suppressTrailingZeroElements suppresses trailing 0 elements - * @return the formatted text in days/hours/minutes/seconds, not null - * @throws IllegalArgumentException if durationMillis is negative + * @param durationMillis the elapsed time to report in milliseconds. + * @param suppressLeadingZeroElements suppresses leading 0 elements. + * @param suppressTrailingZeroElements suppresses trailing 0 elements. + * @return the formatted text in days/hours/minutes/seconds, not null. + * @throws IllegalArgumentException if durationMillis is negative. */ - public static String formatDurationWords( - final long durationMillis, - final boolean suppressLeadingZeroElements, - final boolean suppressTrailingZeroElements) { - + public static String formatDurationWords(final long durationMillis, final boolean suppressLeadingZeroElements, final boolean suppressTrailingZeroElements) { // This method is generally replaceable by the format method, but // there are a series of tweaks and special cases that require // trickery to replicate.
